rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Reddi et al., 2018) and articulates the delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing citation (Duchi, Hazan, and Singer, 2011, JMLR).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (theoretical rate improvement).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no explicit mention of fabrications or harmful content).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
